name: Backlog
description: Nulabs project & issue tracker popular in Japan — Git/SVN hosting, Gantt charts and full REST/Webhooks API.

seo.title: Backlog — CI/CD for Applications
seo.meta_description: Backlog: Nulabs project & issue tracker popular in Japan — Git/SVN hosting, Gantt charts and full REST/Webhooks API.

when_to_use: Git hosting with Gantt charts for Japanese dev teams
SVN to Git migration with issue tracker integration
Webhook-driven CI triggers on pull requests
Burndown charts and milestone tracking for sprints

pros: Gantt charts and Kanban in one tool, rare combo
Tight Git/SVN hosting integrated with tickets
Popular and well-localized for Japanese market
cons: Limited adoption outside Japan hurts ecosystem
Pricing scales oddly by user and project
review.verdict: A solid PM + repo combo for small mixed teams, best when you want Gantt without Jira.
review.best_for: Small teams mixing devs and PMs, especially in APAC, who want Gantt-centric PM.
review.not_for: Engineering-only teams who just need Git hosting and pipelines.
